title: Visible Path, Frozen Path
intendedTensionBeat: One puppy has an obvious visible path that costs dock space; the better route starts frozen but pays off cleaner.
intendedReleaseBeat: Choosing the frozen route first creates a clean rescue pivot and shows the player they read future value correctly.
expectedPath: Invest in the iced route before chasing the obvious broad clear, rescue the better-positioned puppy, then pivot with dock under control.
expectedFailMode: Player takes the visible route first, creates dock residue, and loses tempo before realizing the frozen route was the cleaner rescue path.
designNotes: This should be the first clear comparison level of the band: immediate-looking value versus future rescue value.
